role_adherence_notes.linguistic: The agent provided no output, but this is not a failure of domain adherence, merely a lack of signal.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (Andes, temperate rainforest).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on specific biomes (Valdivian rainforest) and plant types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on infrastructure standards (utility poles, road surfaces) and building materials.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, image quality) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Chile. The linguistic agent failed to provide input, but the other four agents provided strong, consistent evidence pointing to the Southern Cone (Chile/Argentina). The tournament successfully resolved the Chile vs. Argentina ambiguity using architectural and infrastructural cues.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the steep, lush mountains and overcast sky.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the temperate rainforest vegetation on the slopes.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the unpaved road and wooden utility poles.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the corrugated metal housing style.
